videos.headline: Drake Maye slings it to Bryson Nesbit for his 2nd passing TD
videos.description: Bryson Nesbit hauls in the strike from Drake Maye to give the Tar Heels a 21-3 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Drake Maye slings it to Bryson Nesbit for his 2nd passing TD) 2023/09/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Drake Maye fires a 46-yard dime to Nate McCollum for a UNC TD
videos.description: Nate McCollum hauls in a 46-yard dime from Drake Maye to put the Tar heels on the board.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Drake Maye fires a 46-yard dime to Nate McCollum for a UNC TD) 2023/09/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kamari Morales' big-time grab sets up a UNC TD
videos.description: Drake Maye heaves a 55-yard dime to Kamari Morales, then Omarion Hampton punches it in to pad the Tar Heels' lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kamari Morales' big-time grab sets up a UNC TD) 2023/09/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Drake Maye picked off in UNC territory
